reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer un alto en el viaje. Cordialidad y precios accesibles. Sanitarios impecables. Parque externo para relax de personas y mascotas.
Altamente recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop off on your trip. Friendly and affordable prices. Impeccable restrooms. An outdoor park for relaxation for people and pets.
Highly recommended.
